non_applicability_conditions: Findings characterize only the pinned atlas snapshots (theory atlas sha256:f712ea4e9c6b9137fa180ad91e73a86d8d09862792f33174c77acd76a891e610, 87 entries; works atlas sha256:9d14e877efb245cc04b8451734b26285a274dda0418f5131db257d2e4312d373, 214 entries), not the full population of AI-self-consumption artworks or model-collapse literature beyond what each atlas has catalogued.
Findings do not extend to works or papers outside the deterministic candidate sets fixed before classification (works-atlas cluster-7 membership; theory-atlas model-collapse keyword match).

Findings about individual works are bounded by what each atlas's own decisive_move/summary field discloses about that work's production process; an atlas record silent on training provenance cannot license a stronger claim than the record supports.

conditions: work must be catalogued in the pinned works-atlas snapshot, not merely mentioned in secondary commentary
theory-side corroboration is drawn only from the pinned theory-atlas snapshot's own model-collapse keyword match over tags/summary/work
scope_of_validity.population: works in the pinned works-atlas snapshot (corpora/model-collapse/works-atlas.snapshot.json, sha256:9d14e877efb245cc04b8451734b26285a274dda0418f5131db257d2e4312d373, 214 verified data/AI artworks) whose own `clusters` array contains 7 ("AI self-consumption" per src/data/field/clusters.json) — corroborated against the pinned theory-atlas snapshot (corpora/model-collapse/theory-atlas.snapshot.json, sha256:f712ea4e9c6b9137fa180ad91e73a86d8d09862792f33174c77acd76a891e610, 87 provenance-verified sources) for the model-collapse mechanism's own existence
scope_of_validity.time: atlas snapshots pinned 2026-07-21 at the recorded content hashes
